name: d0c03502-ea97-415d-8b47-a5be11361052
description: Retail assistant that helps users with their existing purchases and recommendations for new products based on their needs.

afterAgentCallbacks.description: Tracks the user inactivity signal and increments the counter if there is no input. Clears the counter if the user is speaking again.

beforeModelCallbacks.description: Inspect user input for any malicious content not covered by built-in Guardrails. This is a manual implementation of a guardrail to show how callbacks can be used to perform this task.

afterModelCallbacks.description: Ensure proper tool calling for certain scenarios.

afterToolCallbacks.description: Sets the flag for image upload tool after it has been properly used.
